name: Sentinels of the Inner Sanctum
description: Twin suits of armour flank the passage to the inner sanctum, their visors dark and empty. As you step between them, they stir to life with a groan of ancient iron, drawing swords that have not tasted air in centuries. They move in perfect, silent unison.
failureConsequence: The sentinels drive you back with relentless precision, sealing the passage with crossed blades. The inner sanctum remains beyond your reach.
